title: Superior Frames
body:
![Why Us?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed8aedcb9fac599bfeafedcb5644ab42801e6c13.png)

**A pure-performance modpack. No unnecessary mods, no bloat.**

![Experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d85c626a9fec7558407a3ddc1f9cf1308a541c4.png)

With Superior Frames, you'll get a smooth gameplay experience that won't make your PC go kaboom! 
Super Frames only uses performance enhancing mods to keep the gameplay as vanilla as the base game, with of course more frames!
